rawContent:
Tweet by @KirkMarple (Kirk Marple)
Author bio: Founder/CEO of Graphlit (@graphlit): Operational Context Layer for AI Agents 🚀  @zine_ai @dossium 👋 ex-MSFT, PA born, Seattle bred. Dad to dogs/humans
Text: Solid take. 

Describing what I’ve architected and built for @graphlit over the last 5yr - working from first principles. 

We were years ahead as a solution in search of a problem, but now the world understands that value of context, and its agents not humans who are the real consumer ICP.
